strengths: Power BI and Tableau dashboard development
weaknesses: Shorter total supply chain analytics tenure
No explicit transportation management platform experience
No quantified carrier or DTC fulfillment metrics
improvement_bullets: Developed automated reporting tools to track last mile delivery performance metrics, including on-time delivery (OTD) rates and cost-per-shipment, ensuring actionable insights for operational leadership.
Performed root cause analysis on operational bottlenecks to identify service disruptions and carrier performance failures, driving a 25% improvement in overall team efficiency.
Monitored and reported on DTC fulfillment metrics and SLA compliance, collaborating with stakeholders to optimize workflows and reduce cycle times.
Designed and maintained performance dashboards that consolidate carrier OTIF (On-Time In-Full) data and transit time KPIs to support data-driven decision-making.
Assisted in the evaluation of vendor partnerships by compiling performance scorecards and conducting trend analysis to support business cases for service enhancements.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Fulfillment & Execution opportunity with Foot Locker. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep fascination with how data-driven insights can optimize complex logistics networks and elevate the customer experience in the retail sector. What interests me about working for Foot Locker is its commitment to innovation and its status as a global leader in sneaker culture, which resonates with my passion for brands that blend performance with authentic connection to the consumer. I believe my advanced proficiency in SQL and data visualization and my experience in operational process improvement would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating messy, raw data into clear, executive-ready narratives. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed a series of automated dashboards using Power BI to track key performance indicators. This initiative replaced manual reporting and reduced data processing time by 40%, which allowed leadership to pivot their strategy toward more profitable customer segments. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Fulfillment & Execution role at Foot Locker would allow me to bring my expertise in SQL and dashboarding to optimize last mile delivery and DTC fulfillment operations. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my root cause analysis skills. I identified recurring process bottlenecks by building time-series models that visualized operational health. These insights led to a 300% increase in customer acquisition, demonstrating my ability to turn analytical findings into tangible business growth. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data pipeline management skills in working on infrastructure improvements at Foot Locker. I know that my technical versatility and analytical mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst, Fulfillment & Execution role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
